query: Crime and Punishment Fyodor Dostoevsky commonly cited English translation page count
answer: Crime and Punishment by Fyodor Dostoevsky has a commonly cited English translation with 624 pages. Another popular translation has 608 pages. The most essential fact is the page count varies between editions.
